source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.11|seg.1.1.1.12
distilled_thesis: The prologue begins precisely through going-under, so descent is not merely a cost of the route but the inaugural form in which the route first comes into action.
